allRequiredConditions: request and Blueprint hashes match sign-off
all full Gate revalidation requirements passed
no Rejected, Blocked or Expired status

rules.name: Failure-state deny
rules.requiredAction: Resolve through the lifecycle; Permission cannot be issued.

rules.name: Revalidation deny
rules.requiredAction: Complete and attach every required revalidation result.

rules.name: Permission contract output
rules.requiredAction: Record permission evidence only; this system does not generate or invoke assets.

rules.name: No generation interface
rules.requirement: Permission is a governance result, never an executable asset-generation call.
